title: I-865, Sponsor's Notice of Change of Address
description: Notifies USCIS of a sponsor's address change.

fields.tooltip: Part 5.  Applicant's Statement, Contact Information, Acknowledgement of Appointment at USCIS Application Support Center, Certification, and Signature. NOTE:  Read the information on penalties in the Form I-90 instructions before completing this part.  You must file Form I-90 while in the United States. Applicant's Statement.  NOTE: Select the box for either Item Number 1. A. or 1. B.  If applicable, select the box for Item Number 2., 6 . A . Signature of Applicant.  This form can not be signed electronically.  The name of the applicant can not be typewritten into this space.
fields.notes: Scaffold only. Confirm this field manually before using it for generated filings.

fields.tooltip: Part 3.  Sponsor's Statement, Contact Information, Certification, and Signature.  Sponsor's Signature.  6. B. Enter Date of Signature as 2-digit Month, 2-digit Day, and 4-digit Year.
fields.notes: Scaffold only. Confirm this field manually before using it for generated filings.

fields.tooltip: Part 3.  Sponsor's Statement, Contact Information, Certification, and Signature.  NOTE:  Select the box for either Item Number 1.a. or 1.b.  If applicable, select the box for Item Number 2.  Sponsor's Statement.  Select 1. A. I can read and understand English, and have read and understand every question and instruction on this notice, as well as my answer to every question.
fields.notes: Scaffold only. Confirm this field manually before using it for generated filings.

fields.tooltip: Part 3.  Sponsor's Statement, Contact Information, Certification, and Signature.  NOTE:  Select the box for either Item Number 1.a. or 1.b. fields.tooltip: Part 3.  Sponsor's Statement, Contact Information, Certification, and Signature.  NOTE:  Select the box for either Item Number 1.a. or 1.b. fields.tooltip: Part 3.  Sponsor's Statement, Contact Information, Certification, and Signature.  NOTE:  Select the box for either Item Number 1.a. or 1.b.  If applicable, select the box for Item Number 2.  Sponsor's Statement.  1. B. Enter language you are fluent in.

fields.tooltip: Part 3.  Sponsor's Statement, Contact Information, Certification, and Signature.  NOTE:  Select the box for either Item Number 1.a. or 1.b.  If applicable, select the box for Item Number 2.  Sponsor's Statement.  Select 1. B. The interpreter named in Part 4. has also read to me every question and instruction on this notice, as well as my answer to every question, in a language in which I am fluent.  I understand every question and instruction on this notice as translated to me by my interpreter, and have provided complete, true, and correct responses in the language indicated above.

fields.tooltip: Part 6.  Additional Information.  If you need extra space to provide any additional information within this notice, use the space below.
